title: Daily Independent Journal — February 24, 1959 (Page 2)
author: Daily Independent Journal
card_summary: A clipped page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Tuesday, February 24, 1959, page 2. Likely related to Philip K. Dick or his immediate environment during his San Rafael residence period.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Tuesday, February 24, 1959, page 2. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 5, 2025 by researcher pwshelton8296. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

The Daily Independent Journal was the local newspaper for San Rafael and Marin County, California, where Philip K. Dick lived during the late 1950s and early 1960s. This period was one of Dick's most productive, during which he wrote many of his most celebrated novels. Newspaper clippings from this period are preserved in the archive as documents of Dick's local environment, community events, and the social context in which he lived and worked. The specific content of this page remains to be determined through direct examination of the scanned image.
